basic_details.job_title: Auniati University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Auniati University has officially announced the Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 with 22 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official Auniati University website. Candidates holding a Master's Degree with other qualifications as per UGC norms for Assistant Professor (Ph.D. Degree preferred) can submit their online applications until 25 July 2026. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 28 July 2026, 29 July 2026, and 30 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree and other qualifications as per UGC norms for Assistant Professor, Ph.D. Degree preferred
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Assamese, Economics, Education, English, Folklore, Geography, History, Library and Information Science, Performing Arts, Physical Education and Sports, Political Science, Rural Development, Sociology): Qualifications prescribed under UGC norms for Assistant Professor. Preference to Ph.D. Degree.

selection_process: Academic qualifications and credentials Personal Interview Teaching Demonstration (Demo Class)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Auniati University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Auniati University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Auniati University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Auniati University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Auniati University Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Academic qualifications and credentials Personal Interview Teaching Demonstration (Demo Class)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Auniati University to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Professor posts at Auniati University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Assistant Professor positions at Auniati University is 25th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Auniati University is recruiting for a total of 22 Assistant Professor positions across various departments. This offers a good number of opportunities for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree and other qualifications as per UGC norms. A Ph.D. Degree is preferred for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for Auniati University Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is 1000. This fee needs to be paid online during the application process.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an evaluation of academic qualifications and credentials, followed by a personal interview and a teaching demonstration (demo class).

faq.question: Q6. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for Auniati University Assistant Professor jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for these positions is strictly online. Candidates are required to fill out and submit their applications through the official website or the provided link.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates to remember for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Key dates include the notification release on 18th July 2026, the application deadline on 25th July 2026, and walk-in interview dates from 28th to 30th July 2026, depending on the department.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of Auniati University?
faq.answer: Auniati University is located in Kaliapani, Teok, Assam. Candidates applying should be willing to work at this location.

faq.question: Q10. Does Auniati University offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed in the provided summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details on age relaxation policies.
